content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: authz_bypass ∧ spoof(x-user-id) ⇒ data_tamper
P: hdr_override → session.userId
V: spoof_denied ∧ keep_401
R: ! drop_hdr ∧ ! sess_only
A: data_tamper

[AUDIT]
Goal: review(patch).
Hypothesis: authorization bypass and spoof(x-user-id) implies data_tamper.
Plan: header override then session.userId.
Verify: spoofed requests denied and keep 401 behavior.
Risk: high-risk drop the header path and high-risk verified session auth only.
Answer target: data_tamper.
